problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuroinflammation. Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
